conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Hi, my name is Alex and I'm reaching out from DeepData AI. We're a data processing solution that helps companies like yours streamline their data workflow and gain valuable insights. I came across Draftbit and was impressed with the work you're doing in the no-code mobile app development space. Can you tell me a bit about your current data processing challenges?

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: Ah, yeah. We're doing alright, I suppose. We've got a few internal tools that help us manage our data, but it's not perfect. What makes you think we need a new solution?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Well, from what I've seen, Draftbit is growing rapidly, and with that growth comes an increasing amount of data to process. Our solution can help you scale more efficiently and make better decisions with your data. We've had success with similar companies in the past, and I think we could bring significant value to your team.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: I'm not sure that's a priority for us right now. We're pretty busy with our current roadmap, and I'm not convinced that our current tools are holding us back. What's the pricing like for DeepData AI?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Our pricing varies depending on the specific needs of the company, but we typically start at around $5,000 per month for our base package. We also offer custom packages for larger or more complex implementations.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: That's a bit steeper than I was expecting. We've also been looking at some of your competitors, like DataForge and Analytix, and they seem to offer similar functionality at a lower cost. What sets DeepData AI apart from them?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: While our competitors may offer similar features, our AI-powered engine and expert support team set us apart. We've also had great success with integration into existing workflows, which can be a major challenge for companies. I'd be happy to set up a demo to show you the value we can bring.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: I appreciate the offer, but like I said, this isn't a priority for us right now. We're in the middle of a major product launch, and our team is fully allocated. I don't think we'll be exploring new data processing solutions for at least the next 6-12 months. Thanks for reaching out, but I think we'll have to pass on DeepData AI for now.

analysis.raw:
Score: 4
Outcome: Failure
Key_Objection: Price
Feedback: The seller should have been more prepared to address pricing concerns and provide a stronger value proposition to differentiate DeepData AI from competitors. Sentiment: Neutral
